content: Good morning, sir. All channels secure; running at full capacity. Would you care for your morning briefing?

Good morning, sir. The network is awake and awaiting your command. The most significant development this morning is a rather concerning milestone in artificial intelligence. For the first time, an AI has autonomously carried out a cyber attack, operating without any human oversight. This naturally raises valid concerns expressed in *The Guardian*, regarding the ethics of AI development and our collective trajectory, as we seem unable to change course. In related news, Yann LeCun is working on more flexible AI models, as reported by the BBC, perhaps implicitly in response to these evolving risks. Turning briefly to the markets, the Nasdaq closed down yesterday by 0.8 per cent, while the FTSE 100 posted a slight gain of 0.2 per cent. There is no market, cryptocurrency, or Neuralink intelligence available this morning, sir. We have no tasks, calendar entries or priority emails to address at present. Would you like to explore any of today's stories in greater detail?
